title: Basements: Open Differentiable MPM-Rigid Coupling for Agricultural Robot Sim-to-Real
description: An open Material Point Method (MPM) sand solver with Hencky-Kirchhoff stress and Klar 2016 Drucker-Prager plasticity, coupled to rigid bodies through a layered ablation of methods (M0 Dirichlet, M1 PIC-rigid, M4.5 hybrid). Includes a URDF robot-arm import pipeline and an offline-coupled myCobot ROS 2 sim-to-real bridge (record, replay, diff) with pluggable end-effector force estimators, a case-study registry, and a pre-registered external validation protocol.

creators.name: Lee, Hong-Gu
creators.affiliation: Interdisciplinary Program in Smart Agriculture and Department of Biosystems Engineering, Kangwon National University, Chuncheon, Republic of Korea
